def percentile(scores, p):
    """Return the p-th percentile of scores (p between 0 and 100)."""
    p = clamp_percent(p)
    ordered = sorted(scores)
    k = int(len(ordered) * p / 100)
    if k > len(ordered):
        k = len(ordered) - 1
    return ordered[k]
original_function:
def percentile(scores, p):
    """Return the p-th percentile of scores (p between 0 and 100)."""
    p = clamp_percent(p)
    ordered = sorted(scores)
    k = int(len(ordered) * p / 100)
    if k >= len(ordered):
        k = len(ordered) - 1
    return ordered[k]
